productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed Grey Top
description: Composition Grey melange T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short puff sleeves and grunge look graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The grunge look graphic print on the front with Pacman, dice cubes, tic-tac-toes and the words "Let's play" inspire you to do just that, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans, carpis or shorts. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7' and chest 33"
